summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuildMap UI improvements including dark/light mode toggle, rounded corners (rounded-xl), lucide-react icons, Arabic error messages, and dynamic model loading from OpenRouter API. All requested design improvements are working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: User session expires quickly requiring frequent re-login during testing

design_issues.issue: Theme toggle button missing data-testid attribute for consistent testing

passed_tests: Dark/Light mode toggle works on landing page
Dark/Light mode toggle works on login page
Dark/Light mode toggle works on dashboard
Theme persistence across page navigation
Rounded corners (rounded-xl) on all buttons
Rounded corners (rounded-xl) on form inputs
Rounded corners (rounded-xl) on dialogs (rounded-2xl)
Rounded corners (rounded-xl) on cards and containers
No emojis found in UI - only lucide-react SVG icons used
Landing page loads with proper Arabic RTL layout
Login page design with rounded form elements
Login functionality with test credentials
Dashboard loads with user information and projects
API Key dialog opens with improved design
Model selection dropdown shows 350+ models from OpenRouter API
Dynamic model loading from OpenRouter API working
Arabic error messages implemented in backend
Responsive design elements visible
All interactive elements have proper hover states
Theme toggle icons (Sun/Moon) from lucide-react working
